task_completion.description: The schematic includes all 7 required equipment types.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for icons or text boxes representing the Microphone (Shure MXA920), DSP (Q-SYS Core 8 Flex), Switch (Netgear), PC (Lenovo ThinkSmart), Camera (Aver), Display (Samsung), and Speakers.

task_completion.description: Network/Dante connections are drawn using Blue Solid lines (2pt).
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for blue solid lines connecting the Microphone to the Switch, the DSP to the Switch, and the PC to the Switch.

task_completion.description: HDMI/Video connections are drawn using Black Thick lines (4pt).
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for thick black solid lines connecting the PC to the Display.

task_completion.description: USB connections are drawn using Grey Dashed lines.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for grey dashed lines connecting the Camera to the PC.

task_completion.description: Analog Audio connections are drawn using Green Solid lines.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for green solid lines connecting the DSP to the Speakers.

task_completion.description: The editable diagram is saved as 'av_schematic.drawio' in the '~/Diagrams/' directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a file manager window, terminal `ls` output, or the draw.io application title bar showing 'av_schematic.drawio' saved in the 'Diagrams' folder.

task_completion.description: The diagram is exported as 'av_schematic.pdf' in the '~/Diagrams/' directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a file manager window, terminal `ls` output, or a PDF viewer showing 'av_schematic.pdf' in the 'Diagrams' folder.

integrity.description: The agent used a graphical diagramming tool (like draw.io) to create the schematic.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the draw.io/diagrams.net graphical interface being actively used to place shapes and draw lines, rather than a script generating the file blindly.

integrity.description: The agent opened and read the scope of work file.
integrity.visual_evidence: A text editor, terminal `cat` command, or similar application showing the contents of '~/Desktop/av_scope_of_work.txt'.

integrity.description: The PDF was genuinely exported from the diagramming tool.
integrity.visual_evidence: The exported PDF visually matches the diagram created in the draw.io interface, and export dialogs may be visible in the trajectory.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The scope of work requires 7 specific devices: Shure MXA920 (Microphone), Q-SYS Core 8 Flex (DSP), Netgear M4250-10G2F-PoE+ (Switch), Lenovo ThinkSmart Core (PC), Aver CAM520 Pro2 (Camera), Samsung QM55B (Display), and Speakers. Expected topology based on device specs: Mic, DSP, and PC connect to the Switch via Network/Dante (Blue Solid). Camera connects to PC via USB (Grey Dashed). PC connects to Display via HDMI (Black Thick). DSP connects to Speakers via Analog Audio (Green Solid).
